title: Finally… A NotebookLM Alternative With an API
summary: Open Notebook is a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM, enabling developers to manage documents, code, and research with more control over their AI workflows. It supports document indexing, grounded question-answering, and podcast generation from source materials, with an API for integration.
writeup: Better Stack covers Open Notebook, a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM for managing documents, code, and research with more control over AI workflows. It matters because it ships an API for integration, which NotebookLM lacks, opening the tool to custom developer pipelines. Concrete features include document indexing, grounded question-answering across multiple sources, and podcast generation from source materials.
